findings.thai: ความยาวของบทความสองชิ้น
findings.romanization: khwaam yaao khawng bot-khwaam sawng chin
findings.reason: The word 'ชิ้น' (chin) has a low-class initial consonant (ช) with a sonorant final and a mai tho tone mark, which results in a high tone, not falling.
The word 'ความ' (khwaam) has a low-class initial consonant cluster (คว) with a long vowel and a sonorant final, which results in a mid tone, not rising.

findings.thai: ความเสี่ยงของสองแผนนี้
findings.romanization: khwaam siang khawng sawng phaen nii
findings.reason: The word 'เสี่ยง' (siang) has a high-class initial consonant (ส) with a mai ek tone mark, which results in a low tone, not falling.

findings.thai: ค่อยๆ ขยาย
findings.reason: The word 'ขยาย' (kha-yaai) is pronounced with a low tone for 'kha' (high-class initial with short vowel) and a rising tone for 'yaai' (low-class initial following a high-class initial, taking high-class rules with a sonorant final).

findings.thai: ค่อยๆ ยิ้ม
findings.reason: The word 'ยิ้ม' (yim) has a low-class initial consonant (ย) with a mai tho tone mark, which results in a high tone, not falling.

findings.thai: ค่อยๆ สว่างขึ้น
findings.reason: The syllable 'ว่าง' (waang) in 'สว่าง' follows the high-class initial 'ส', so it takes high-class tone rules. With a mai ek tone mark, it results in a low tone, not mid.

findings.thai: ค่อยๆ อธิบาย
findings.reason: The syllable 'ธิ' (thi) has a low-class initial consonant (ธ) with a short vowel and no final consonant (dead syllable), which results in a high tone, not mid.
